Summary: As a delivery person, I want to view my assigned deliveries and use the "Get Directions" feature to navigate to the customer's address.
As an agent, I want a dashboard to see my pending orders and operating hours to manage my daily workflow.
As an agent, I want to update my stock status (Low, Medium, Available) so that customers see accurate availability in the app.
As a user, I want to type and submit a specific message or complaint through a contact form for the support team to review.
As a customer, I want to rate my experience (e.g., Very Satisfied to Very Dissatisfied) after a delivery is completed to provide feedback.
As a user, I want to access "Call Us" or "Email Us" buttons so that I can quickly contact the team for help or inquiries.
As a user, I want to view safety tips, such as keeping cylinders upright, while waiting for my delivery.
As a user, I want to enter my order number on the tracking screen to quickly find the status of a specific delivery.
As a customer, I want to see if my order is "On the way," "Out for Delivery," or "Delivered" so I know when to expect it.
As a customer, I want to confirm my delivery location and click "Place Order" to finalize my purchase.
As a user, I want to view a list of nearby agents with their distance in km so that I can choose the most convenient supplier.
As a customer, I want to select between different cylinder sizes (2.3kg, 5kg, 12.5kg) so that I can order the specific type of gas I need.
As a user, I want to edit my profile and update my delivery address so that my orders are delivered to the correct location.
As a returning customer, I want to log in using my Username/NIC and Password so that I can access my saved profile and order history.

User Management & Security
As a new user, I want to sign up using my Name, NIC, Address, and a Password so that I can create a secure account for ordering gas.
